name_en: 🆕 【Top Grade Original】M14909 Cosmetic Pouch 👏🏻👏🏻 The 'Pochet Cosmetic PM' features a single-compartment Dunne canvas with Louis Vuitton retro travel stickers. The canvas, reminiscent of sand tones, gives a modern feel, while the 'stickers' evoke the origin of the estate. Dimensions: 19 x 12 x 6 cm
